steps: Mount the gels in the vertical electrophoresis apparatus.
Load samples under the cathode buffer. Apply 10μL sample volumes to 0.7 × 5 mm sample wells. 10 µL
Set running conditions appropriate to your type of gel. We usually set 200V to run at the beginning, after 10 minutes change the voltage into 300V for another 30 minutes.

Protein can be visualized directly in the gel by Coomassie staining or silver staining. We usually choose Coomassie staining, then transfer the gel to the decolorizing solution and remove the dye solution.
